purpose: Query direct construction over the full parse surface: default [1,1] bound, negation to [0,0], explicit bounds, edge-vs-node components, whitespace stripping, the two silent misparses (no-paren truncates the predicate to pred_comp[:-1] with component pred_comp[0:-1]; '~pred(x):[l,u]' keeps the '~' in the predicate name because the ':' branch never strips it), and the one raising arm (non-numeric bound floats). Acceptance banks the four parsed fields + echoed text, so a misparse is itself the compared observation.
provenance: docs/surface.md type:Query all eight input classes; query.py:4-37, query_parser.py:5-34 at the pin; screened live 2026-07-07 (screen_types.py)
